title: Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe Lyrics Saravana
stanzas: <div>Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe Lyrics Saravana

unnoda prushanaaga
vaela pottu kudu enakku
kooli kooda thaevailla
ezhuthi kudakatta

vaela pottu kuduthu puttaa
kaala vaari vittuduva
unna naanum namba maataen
thalli nilluda

naan naenacha mudippaen
evan thadutha vedippaen
nee enna venanu sollaathae

un dhillum theriyum
un lollum theriyum
nee enna summathaan
merattaathae

pidivaatham vaendamadi
naan pidivaatha kaaranadi
naan aasapatta paenae neethaan

enna mattum vaena sollathae
nee enna mattum venaa sollathae
nee enna mattum venaa sollathae
nee enna mattum venaa sollathae

unnoda prushanaaga
vaela pottu kudu enakku
kooli kooda thaevailla
ezhuthi kudakatta

vaela pottu kuduthu puttaa
kaala vaari vittuduva
unna naanum namba maataen
thalli nilluda

manasa odichuputtu
vayasa kadichukittu
thaviya thavikiraennae
vaadi vaadi

raettum pottuputta,
kitta vanthuputta
annala kothikkiraene
poda poda

un vaegathile udhataala
thinam nadapatha paarpaenae

un udama en udambaale
thinam eda pottu paarpaene

ohh..nachunnu unna
thaan kattikidava
chikkunu naanum
thaan ottikidava

ada naan thaan
unna mulusaaga
muzhungidava

naan konjam morattu ponnu
ada nee konjam thalli nillu
unna thaanae kaapathika
enna mattum kathal panaathae
enna mattum kathal panaathae
enna mattum kathal panaathae
nee enna mattum kathal
panaathae, hoi!

mooda mathiputta
sooda aethiputta
aedho pannuthuda
ulla ulla

enna bothai ingae,
unna kathalika
evanum kurukkidave
illa illa

naa unna pathi nenakayilla
en odambaelaam otharuthada

naan un viralai pudikayila
en oththa naadi padharuthadi

unnakum ennaukkum
aega poruthom
ithaanda oorrukku
romba uruthoam

ada yaaru enna
sonnaalum namakaenada

unna naan vidmaataendi
nee sollamaa thodamaataendi
un kaala suthi irrupaenadi
enna mattum vaena sollaathae

unnoda prushanaaga
vaela pottu kudu enakku
kooli kooda thaevailla
ezhuthi kudakatta

unna naanum namba maataen
thalli nilluda

evan thadutha vedippaen
nee enna venanu sollaathae

un dhillum theriyum
un lollum theriyum
nee enna summathaan
merattaathae

pidivaatham vaendamadi
naan pidivaatha kaaranadi
naan aasapatta paenae neethaan

enna mattum vaena sollathae

nee enna mattum venaa sollathae
nee enna mattum venaa sollathae

enna mattum vaena sollathae
enna mattum vaena sollathae
enna aenna mattum vaena sollathae
enna mattum vaenna sollathae

seo.title: Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe Lyrics Saravana
seo.description: Full Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe songs lyrics, Saravana Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Srikanth Deva, Singer(s): Rita, Sukhwinder Singh.
seo.keywords: Saravana, Srikanth Deva, Rita, Sukhwinder Singh, Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe full lyrics, Saravana songs lyrics, Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe lyrics snippets, Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of heartbreak and longing, capturing the emotional turmoil of love lost.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Saravana, this song reflects the protagonist's struggles with love and the pain of separation.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Rita and Sukhwinder Singh.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe was composed by Srikanth Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released on January 14, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe, the emotional weight of heartbreak is poignantly conveyed through the heartfelt lyrics and soulful melodies. The song captures the protagonist's inner turmoil as he grapples with feelings of loss and longing. The collaboration between Rita and Sukhwinder Singh brings a unique depth to the performance, making it resonate with listeners. Overall, this track serves as a beautiful reminder of the complexities of love and the pain that often accompanies it.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Mattum Vaena Sollathe from Saravana is a poignant duet that beautifully captures the essence of heartbreak. With the soulful voices of Rita and Sukhwinder Singh, this track resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love's trials. The masterful composition by Srikanth Deva adds a layer of emotional depth, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: I don't need your work, just give me the payment, I don't need anything else, just write it down.
After giving the work, you will lose your time, I won't let you go, stay here.
If I think about it, I will finish it, don't tell me what you want.
You know your worth, you know your value, don't just act casually.
I don't want to be tied down, I am not the one to be tied down, I am the one who is waiting for you.
I don't want to be tied down, I am not the one to be tied down, I am the one who is waiting for you.
I don't need your work, just give me the payment, I don't need anything else, just write it down.
After giving the work, you will lose your time, I won't let you go, stay here.
If I think about it, I will finish it, don't tell me what you want.
I am losing my mind, I am getting older, I am just wasting my time.
I am coming to you, I am getting angry, go away, go away.
You will see how I walk with your speed every day.
You will see how I look at you every day.
Oh, I am dancing, you are the one who is making me dance, I am also dancing.
I am the one who is completely lost in you.
I am a little stubborn, you are a little careless, you should take care of me, I don't want to love you, I don't want to love you, I don't want to love you, you don't want to love me, hey!
I am thinking about something, I am doing something, I am feeling something inside.
I don't care about anything here, no one can stop me from loving you.
I don't think about you, my body is just moving around.
I am holding your hand, I am just holding on to you.
You and I are meant to be together, this is a big deal for us.
Whoever says anything, it doesn't matter to us.
I won't let you go, you can't say anything, I will keep you close, I don't need your work, just give me the payment, I don't need anything else, just write it down.
After giving the work, you will lose your time, I won't let you go, stay here.

I don't need your work, just give me the payment, I don't need anything else, just write it down.
